pr.title: Record Submission: 1.0541 BPB - 5-expert Hedge Mixer + CROWN-Q + stride=64

output.summary: Combines a 5-expert Hedge mixer with warmdown CROWN-Q penalty and stride/TTT tweaks to favor quantization-friendly weights and faster eval.
techniques: Warmdown CROWN-Q penalty to shrink quantization-sensitive weights
Stride=64 sliding window frees budget for a 4th TTT epoch
5-expert Hedge mixer over n-gram and entropy stats
